'''daguchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beadle|beadle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beadle|beadle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| daguchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dægichith|dægichith]] || [[word:dægichij|dægichij]] || [[word:dægichish|dægichish]] || [[word:dægichi|dægichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:daguguchuth|daguguchuth]] || [[word:daguguchuj|daguguchuj]] || [[word:daguguchush|daguguchush]] || [[word:daguguchu|daguguchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:daguchuth|daguchuth]] || [[word:daguchuj|daguchuj]] || [[word:daguchush|daguchush]] || [[word:daguchu|daguchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dagufchuth|dagufchuth]] || [[word:dagufchuj|dagufchuj]] || [[word:dagufchush|dagufchush]] || [[word:dagufchuf|dagufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:daguchuthu|daguchuthu]] || [[word:daguchuju|daguchuju]] || [[word:daguchushu|daguchushu]] || [[word:daguchuku|daguchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:daguchuth|daguchuth]] || [[word:daguchuj|daguchuj]] || [[word:daguchush|daguchush]] || [[word:daguchu|daguchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:daguchuthul|daguchuthul]] || [[word:daguchujul|daguchujul]] || [[word:daguchushul|daguchushul]] || [[word:daguchukul|daguchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:daguchuthuthu|daguchuthuthu]] || [[word:daguchujuju|daguchujuju]] || [[word:daguchushushu|daguchushushu]] || [[word:daguchuku|daguchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:daguchuthun|daguchuthun]] || [[word:daguchujun|daguchujun]] || [[word:daguchushun|daguchushun]] || [[word:daguchukun|daguchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:daguchuthuoro|daguchuthuoro]] || [[word:daguchujuoro|daguchujuoro]] || [[word:daguchushuoro|daguchushuoro]] || [[word:daguchukuoro|daguchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
